description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a hip roof covered in dark gray tiles. The front facade features large, vertically aligned windows and a prominent balcony supported by a single column. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored siding with a darker base trim, and the windows are framed in black with blue-tinted glass. The rear of the house includes a wide covered patio area, providing sheltered outdoor space. The side elevations are simpler, with smaller windows and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and geometric forms. The overall design is contemporary, with an emphasis on symmetry and functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, large front windows, a balcony, and a covered rear patio, finished in light siding and dark trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing large vertical windows, a balcony with a single supporting column, and the main entrance area.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal windows and a simple wall, highlighting the hip roof's extension.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a wide covered patio and a row of windows above and below the overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a balcony visible, small windows, and the continuation of the hip roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large vertical windows on the front and smaller windows on the sides
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a balcony above, large glass panels, and a single supporting column; minimal decorative elements.
